name: Bree Playground
description:
You are in the playground of Bree.  This is where the children come to frolic
and play.  The energy shown by these children makes you think about renting a
room at the the Prancing Pony.  The playground is covered with grass and large
trees provide more than adequate shade for a hot summer Bree day.    
You see a sandbox where children can dig around and play.
